ie.updateNote: Following the 13 October attack in Arras, France has raised its national threat level to the highest, ‘Emergency’ level. This is level 3 on the French Vigipirate security programme. General Travel Advice Irish citizens need a valid passport or passport card to enter France. Irish passports do not have a minimum validity requirement while travelling to the UK or within the EU.
